zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln於大約1192年出生在英國林可爾史爾林肯時，他的父親Roger de Lacy23歲，母親Matilda de Clare31歲。他於1214年與Alice de l'Aigle在英國越可爾朋特福拉可特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾被列為    enforcer of magna carta  。他去世於1240年7月22日在英國英格蘭爾斯坦洛福享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾斯坦洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln于大约1192年出生在英国林可爾史爾林肯时，他的父亲Roger de Lacy23岁，母亲Matilda de Clare31岁。他于1214年与Alice de l'Aigle在英国越可爾朋特福拉可特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾被列为    enforcer of magna carta  。他去世于1240年7月22日在英国英格兰爾斯坦洛福享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾斯坦洛福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln was born about 1192, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Roger de Lacy, was 23 and his mother, Matilda de Clare, was 31. He married Alice de l'Aigle in 1214, in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as     enforcer of magna carta   in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 22 July 1240, in Stanlow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Stanlow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln est né environ 1192, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Lacy, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Clare, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alice de l'Aigle en 1214, à Pontefract, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est     enforcer of magna carta   à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1240, à Stanlow, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Stanlow, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln um 1192 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Lacy 23 und seine Mutter Matilda de Clare 31. Er hat 1214 in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England Alice de l'Aigle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als     enforcer of magna carta   in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Juli 1240 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Stanlow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stanlow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln è nato il circa 1192 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Lacy, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Clare, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alice de l'Aigle nel 1214, nel Pontefract, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come     enforcer of magna carta   nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 22 luglio 1240, nel Stanlow, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Stanlow, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincolnが約1192年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Roger de Lacyは23歳，母Matilda de Clareは31歳であった。1214年にイギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトでAlice de l'Aigleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでの職業は    enforcer of magna carta  と記録されている。彼は1240年7月22日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアスタンロウで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアスタンロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln(이)가 대략 1192년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Lacy(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Clare(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1214년 영국 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에서 Alice de l'Aigle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서     enforcer of magna carta  이었다. 그는 1240년 7월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스탠로에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스탠로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln nasceu aproximadamente 1192, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Lacy, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Clare, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de l'Aigle em 1214, em Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como     enforcer of magna carta   em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1240, em Stanlow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Stanlow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln родился около 1192 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Lacy было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Clare, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de l'Aigle в 1214 г. в местности понтефракт, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии     enforcer of magna carta   в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 22 июля 1240 г. в местности стэнлоу, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности стэнлоу, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln nació aproximadamente 1192, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Lacy, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Matilda de Clare, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alice de l'Aigle en 1214, en Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era     enforcer of magna carta   en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 22 de julio de 1240, en Stanlow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Stanlow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
